# shepi

> AI-assisted Quality of Earnings (QoE) analysis for small and lower-middle-market M&A due diligence. shepi gives independent searchers, PE firms, CPA firms, and SBA lenders a structured diligence workflow that used to require a full transaction advisory team — without pretending AI can replace professional judgment.

shepi is **analyst-in-the-loop**, not push-button QoE. The platform ingests raw financials (general ledger, P&L, balance sheet, bank statements), proposes EBITDA add-backs, normalizations, and red flags, and produces lender-ready QoE outputs. A human analyst reviews and signs off on every conclusion.

## Core capabilities

- Financial ingestion and normalization (multi-period P&L, balance sheet, GL detail)
- EBITDA add-back identification (owner compensation, personal expenses, one-time items, run-rate adjustments)
- Working capital and cash-proof analysis
- Revenue quality and customer concentration testing
- Earnings manipulation and anomaly detection
- Lender-ready QoE report export (SBA-compliant format)

## Who shepi is built for

- Independent searchers and self-funded buyers running SBA-backed acquisitions
- Lower-middle-market private equity associates pre-screening targets
- CPA firms offering buy-side QoE as a productized service
- SBA 7(a) lenders validating buyer-supplied diligence
- Sell-side advisors preparing books for market

- [Pricing](https://shepi.ai/pricing)
- [How much does a Quality of Earnings cost?](https://shepi.ai/quality-of-earnings-cost)
- [Privacy policy](https://shepi.ai/privacy)
- [Terms of service](https://shepi.ai/terms)
- [Data processing agreement](https://shepi.ai/dpa)

## What shepi is NOT

- Not a replacement for a licensed CPA's professional opinion
- Not an audit and not auditor-signed
- Not a fully autonomous "push button, get a QoE" tool — every conclusion requires human review
- Not a substitute for legal, tax, or fairness-opinion services

## Contact

- Website: https://shepi.ai
- Operated by: SMB EDGE
